case_title: CENTER FOR ENVIRONMENTAL HEALTH, VS. DOLLAR EMPIRE, LLC et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON OCT-20-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF CENTER FOR ENVIRONMENTAL HEALTH'S MOTION FOR COURT APPROVAL AND ENTRY OF CONSENT JUDGMENT AS TO DOLLAR EMPIRE, LLC IS GRANTED. BASED ON THE SUPPLEMENTAL DECLARATION OF COUNSEL FILED TODAY, THE FEES AND PENALTY PROVISIONS ARE REASONABLE AND THE REFORMULATION IS COMPLIANT WITH PROPOSITION 65. ORDER AND JUDGMENT WERE SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
